cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking which of the options is a humorous edit of the phrase 'mean girls'. The options are (A) bean girls, (B) oean girls, (C) meyan girls, and (D) mean giwls. Humorous edits usually involve playing with the spelling of a word in a way that sounds similar but changes the meaning or creates a funny effect. I'll go through each option to see which one is a humorous twist on "mean girls". Option A: "bean girls" - This changes the "m" in "mean" to a "b",
